accepted_scope: PFI v0.2.5 Stage 0 through Stage 11 accepted transition evidence
Stage 12 Phase 12.1 automated real E2E and regression candidate
Stage 12 Phase 12.2 canonical CLI App and target-Mac resilience candidate

known_defects.disposition: Use deterministic owned-process suspend/resume; do not claim kernel sleep/wake.
Keep holding edit not_run and verify no false zero or fixture fallback.
Retain CLI bundle execution and headless-browser evidence; never claim Finder execution.
Retain the explicit no-axe claim and deterministic WCAG 2.2 AA, keyboard and CDP AX substitute.
Retain six immutable historical-state tests as debt and require current-state replacement gates.

required_before_confirmation: open P0 and P1 counts remain zero
version, build, exact commit and evidence-index hash still match this request
